div1.entryFree: Mope, to be in a state of unconsciousness, to move and act without the impulse and guidance of thought: even in a dream were we divided from them and were brought --ing hither, Tp. V, 240. what a wretched and peevish fellow is this king of England, to m. with his fat-brained followers so far out of his knowledge, H5 III, 7, 143. eyes without feeling, feeling without sight, ears without hands or eyes, smelling sans all, or but a sickly part of one true sense could not so m. Hml. III, 4, 81.
